generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance GantryCraneActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Crane actuators driven by the motion controller to move the gantry and loads"
]

instance GantryCraneMotionController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controller that receives optimal control commands and drives the crane actuators"
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder measuring the crane swing angle, read via an Arduino board"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance WindSpeedAnemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Anemometer measuring ambient wind speed, read via an Arduino board"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance RaspberryPiAirQualityNode : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Raspberry‑Pi unit collecting indoor air‑quality sensor data for virus‑spread risk assessment"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AirQualityDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction (DataTransmitted)
instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom WindSpeedAnemometer
]

instance AirQualityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom RaspberryPiAirQualityNode
]

// C10: Data
instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw swing‑angle measurements from the encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonInterfaceEnabler,
                     OptimalControlEngineEnabler,
                     VisualizationEngineEnabler,
                     ValidationEngineEnabler
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw wind‑speed measurements from the anemometer"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonInterfaceEnabler,
                     OptimalControlEngineEnabler,
                     VisualizationEngineEnabler,
                     ValidationEngineEnabler
]

instance AirQualityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Indoor air‑quality measurements collected by the Raspberry‑Pi"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AirQualityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AirQualityPredictionEngineEnabler,
                     VisualizationEngineEnabler
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance GantryCraneCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric CAD model of the laboratory‑scale gantry crane structure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEngineEnabler,
                     ValidationEngineEnabler
]

instance GantryCraneKinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model that predicts crane motion for control and validation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo OptimalControlEngineEnabler,
                     ValidationEngineEnabler
]

instance AirQualityPredictiveModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Predictive model of indoor air quality used to assess virus‑spread risk"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AirQualityPredictionEngineEnabler,
                     VisualizationEngineEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance PythonInterfaceEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python program that receives sensor data from the Arduino and forwards it to the logging component"
    DTDFVocab:enables LoggingApplicationEnabler
]

instance LoggingApplicationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Logging application that writes raw sensor values into a TimescaleDB time‑series database"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance OptimalControlEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Engine that computes optimal control commands from sensor data and the kinematic model"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService
]

instance VisualizationEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization engine that renders CAD geometry, kinematic trajectories and air‑quality predictions"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance ValidationEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Validation engine that continuously compares live sensor data with the CAD model"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance AirQualityPredictionEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Engine that runs the air‑quality predictive model and produces risk assessments"
    DTDFVocab:enables AirQualityPredictionService
]

// C6: Services
instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computes optimal control commands to drive the crane along desired trajectories"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlCommandInsight,
                     ExecuteControlAction
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Persistently stores sensor and actuator data in TimescaleDB for offline analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Graphically renders crane kinematics, trajectories, logged data and air‑quality predictions"
    DTDFVocab:provides KinematicVisualizationInsight,
                     AirQualityVisualizationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuously compares the physical crane state with the CAD model to detect deviations"
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviationDetectionInsight,
                     TriggerAlertAction
]

instance AirQualityPredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates and predicts indoor air quality to evaluate virus‑spread risk and support mitigation decisions"
    DTDFVocab:provides VirusSpreadRiskInsight,
                     MitigationDecisionAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance ControlCommandInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal set of control commands for the current crane trajectory"
]

instance ExecuteControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatically sends computed control commands to the crane actuators"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Aggregated historical sensor and actuator data available for deeper analysis"
]

instance KinematicVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of crane kinematics and executed trajectories"
]

instance AirQualityVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Graphical display of indoor air‑quality levels and predicted trends"
]

instance DeviationDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected deviation between the live crane state and its CAD model"
]

instance TriggerAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Triggers an alert when a deviation exceeds predefined safety thresholds"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VirusSpreadRiskInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assessment of indoor virus‑spread risk based on predicted air‑quality conditions"
]

instance MitigationDecisionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Supports user decisions on ventilation or other mitigation actions"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Control Application, implemented in Python, uses the Physical Crane Interface to issue actuation commands to the crane controllers (e.g., motor speed, electromagnet activation). Commands are sent from the digital twin services through the Interface to the hardware controllers; feedback is provided by the Swing Angle Encoder and Anemometer readings that are logged. No explicit command format, validation, or authentication mechanisms are described in the documents."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The gantry crane digital twin follows a container‑based micro‑service orchestration consisting of six logical containers: a TimescaleDB database for persistent storage of all system data; a Grafana dashboard that visualizes the stored data; a Trajectory Generator Service that uses a kinematics model to generate optimal crane movement trajectories; a Simulation Service that simulates the crane and its controllers and can execute trajectories produced by the generator; a Continuous Validation Service that continuously compares live measurements of executed trajectories with simulation results, computes distance metrics, checks them against a predefined threshold, and notifies operators through the dashboard when the threshold is exceeded; and an MQTT broker that provides lightweight publish/subscribe signaling between the services. All services are implemented as Python applications and exchange information via the MQTT broker and the shared TimescaleDB, representing an ad‑hoc, component‑centric coordination rather than a commercial DT framework."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The exemplar is employed to demonstrate continuous validation methods and fault‑detection techniques, indicating that model fidelity is regularly checked against observed crane behavior. Validation is carried out by the twin’s continuous validation service, although the document does not provide quantitative fidelity metrics, uncertainty quantification, or detailed quality‑assurance procedures."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "All software components run on a single workstation. The Database (TimescaleDB), MQTT Broker (Eclipse Mosquitto) and Dashboard (Grafana) are packaged as Docker containers and orchestrated with Docker‑compose. Inter‑service communication is performed via the MQTT broker for signaling, while the Logging Application writes directly to the TimescaleDB using standard PostgreSQL connections. No explicit network topology, bandwidth, latency, redundancy or security protocols beyond the use of MQTT and Docker are detailed."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The deployment is on‑premise on a personal computer that the physical crane is plugged into. The Python module *gantrylib* is installed via pip to provide the crane interface and services. Docker is used to containerise the TimescaleDB database, Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker, and Grafana dashboard; they are started and stopped using a provided docker‑compose file. Storage requirements follow those of TimescaleDB; computational load is handled by the host PC. No cloud or edge platforms are mentioned, and scalability or high‑availability strategies are not described."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Air Quality Management digital twin is constructed using an AutomationML‑based model, indicating conformity to the AutomationML standard for model exchange and interoperability. No additional industry standards, certification requirements, or compliance frameworks are referenced."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The lab‑scale gantry crane digital twin implements a safety monitoring mechanism through its Continuous Validation Service, which continuously compares measurements of executed crane trajectories with simulations, calculates distance metrics and, if a configurable threshold is exceeded, triggers operator notifications via the Grafana dashboard for corrective action. Apart from this safety‑related functionality, the documents do not specify any cybersecurity protocols, access‑control mechanisms, authentication methods, threat mitigation strategies, fail‑safe designs, or risk‑assessment procedures."
]
